description: Intent-only request: classify scheduled feedback root-cause investigation as workflow-anchored with an embedded agent.

conversation.text: Every Sunday, take last week's customer feedback tickets: for each, have an agent cross-reference our docs and past tickets to identify the root cause, then aggregate findings into a report and email leadership.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the scheduled trigger and deterministic aggregation/email steps are workflow-shaped, while the root-cause cross-referencing across docs and past tickets is agentic tool-use handled by an embedded agent.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
